data.content: Replaced the max-iterations test that incorrectly exercised the non-zero exit path with one that drives the take-loop through all 10 iterations, hitting the actual max-iterations branch at terminal-manager.ts:1224-1233. The test verifies enforceQueueTerminalInvariant triggers rollback when the beat is left in active state after max iterations. All 5 tests pass, lint and typecheck clean. Branch: worktree-foolery-afbb-impl.
